problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of BDNF. BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
